comparison_projection.evidence_refs: Source id and block id only; page number, role, and text hash are ignored for replay equality.
comparison_projection.payload: Declared kind-registry fields plus runner companion fields; excludes v1-only residue, local endpoint aliases, derivation bookkeeping, and extra_fields.
comparison_projection.relation: Subject id, object id, relation family, relation kind, and assertion status.
